name: Output Processing & Subtask Extraction
description: Processes raw Claude CLI output to extract subtasks, team members, and inject child outputs back into parent tasks. Handles token limit errors and model-switching on retry.

Managers/OutputProcessor.cs.content:
class OutputProcessor
  L36: AppendOutput(string taskId, string text, ObservableCollection<AgentTask> activeTasks, ObservableCollection<AgentTask> historyTasks) -> void
  L42: AppendColoredOutput(string taskId, string text, Brush foreground, ObservableCollection<AgentTask> activeTasks, ObservableCollection<AgentTask> historyTasks) -> void
  L223: TryInjectSubtaskResult(AgentTask child, ObservableCollection<AgentTask> activeTasks, ObservableCollection<AgentTask> historyTasks) -> void  // Synchronous wrapper kept for backward compatibility (non-UI-thread callers).
  L299: InjectSubtaskResult(AgentTask parent, AgentTask child) -> void  // Synchronous wrapper kept for backward compatibility (non-UI-thread callers).

patterns: JSON stream parsing for tool calls and output events
Subtask injection writes result back to parent prompt
dependencies: Called from TaskProcessLauncher on output events
Uses ModelComplexityAnalyzer for retry model selection
